---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Shih Chien University

**English Taught Program in International Business**

-   [**Statistics I & II**](https://yyliou.github.io/stat), Undergraduate, Fall, 2024, 2025; Spring, 2025, 2026.

-   **Programming for Application**, Undergraduate, Spring, 2024, 2025, 2026.

-   [**Data Analysis**](https://yyliou.github.io/da), Undergraduate, Fall, 2024, 2025.
